ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who created the survey */,
  "survey_title" TEXT /* Title of the survey */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the survey starts */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the survey ends */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the survey (e.g., Active, Completed) */,
  "branding_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the client's logo for branding */,
  "branding_color_scheme" TEXT /* Color scheme for survey branding */,
  "target_demographics" TEXT /* Target demographics for the survey */,
  "response_goal" INTEGER /* Target number of responses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company the client represents */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the client operates in */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "client_since" TEXT /* Date the client started using the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of the question (e.g., Multiple Choice, Open-Ended) */,
  "options" TEXT /* Possible options for multiple-choice questions */,
  "required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the question is mandatory */,
  "question_order" INTEGER /* Order of the question in the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question being answered */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent */,
  "answer" TEXT /* The answer provided by the respondent */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the response was recorded */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Time the response was recorded */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the respondent for security and fraud detection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "respondents" (
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the respondent took */,
  "demographics" TEXT /* Demographic information about the respondent */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the respondent */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the respondent */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the respondent */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the respondent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_counts" (
  "count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each count record */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question */,
  "answer" TEXT /* The answer for which the count and percentage are recorded */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Total count of responses for the answer */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of total responses for the answer */,
  "demographic_breakdown" TEXT /* Breakdown of counts by demographics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("count_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_counts_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the report is based on */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who requested the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report's findings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report section */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the section belongs to */,
  "section_title" TEXT /* Title of the section */,
  "section_content" TEXT /* Content of the section, including data visualizations and analyses */,
  "section_type" TEXT /* Type of section (e.g., Chart, Table, Text) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_sections_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the user represents */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user to log in */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user to log in */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
